creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Hidden Gem Alert! 💎💎💎

Have you ever been to Fort DeSoto Park in St. Petersburg, Florida?? If not, take this as your sign to GO! 

This park offers three beaches (including an awesome dog beach!), hiking and biking trails, fishing piers, a historic fort, ferries to nearby islands, and camping! Put this place on your list for sure!

#fortdesoto #stpeteflorida #stateparksflorida #floridahiddengems #bucketlistflorida

transcription.text: Did you know this hidden gem existed in Florida? Welcome to Fort DeSoto Park located in St. Petersburg on the west coast of Florida. This park is absolutely amazing and offers so much more than just the beach, but the three miles of white sandy beaches here are incredible. The sand is white and soft and the water is crystal clear. I was wowed the moment I laid eyes on it. This area is well known for manatee sightings. I saw four within the first hour of arriving. They were so cute and these two look like they were kissing or fighting over seagrass. Who knows? A unique feature of this beach are the remnants of the historic fort in the water so feel free to explore and snorkel around them. Just don't climb on them and heed the signs. If you have a dog, this is the place for you because there's an amazing dog beach too. Just look at how much fun they're having. History buffs will love the historic fort dating back to 1898 that you can explore right next to the beach. This is one of the most unique places in Florida to check out the next time you're in the area. Be sure to save this post and send it to a friend you would want to visit here with and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
